ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with structured fields. Original certificate with ICC stamp and verification code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 5 pages. Issued by SKF Eurotrade AB. Contains detailed line items, transport details, and weight information.

document_pairing.method: Certificate references invoice number 8500030660 dated 24.02.2026. Invoice file (Document B) contains invoice number 8500030660 dated 24.02.2026. Consignor SKF Eurotrade AB matches invoice issuer. Consignee PC Prompodshipnik matches Bill to/Sold to/Ship to.

criteria_met: Certificate invoice reference 8500030660 matches invoice number 8500030660
Certificate consignor SKF Eurotrade AB matches invoice issuer SKF Eurotrade AB
Certificate consignee PC Prompodshipnik matches invoice Bill to/Sold to PC Prompodshipnik

rule_activation.lc_details: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-26D-465612 does not constitute an LC reference.

Invoice page 2: 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB' in footer
Invoice page 3: 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB' in footer
Invoice page 4: 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB' in footer
Invoice page 5: 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB' in footer and in exporter declaration

comparison_steps.description: Check if consignor name appears anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - SKF Eurotrade AB appears as issuer in invoice header, footer on all pages, and in Issued by block. Direct match, no koncernstruktur needed.
MATCH - Certificate: 'SKF Eurotrade AB', Invoice: 'SKF Eurotrade AB'. Identical company name.
MATCH - Certificate: Sweden, Invoice: Sweden (in issuer address block). Also confirmed by IBAN prefix SE.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found directly as invoice issuer

consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'SKF Eurotrade AB' exactly matches invoice issuer 'SKF Eurotrade AB'. Address normalizes to same city (GÖTEBORG/Goteborg). Country Sweden matches on both documents. IBAN SE prefix and address confirm Sweden.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate box 1: 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice header/issuer: 'SKF Eurotrade AB, 415 50 Goteborg, Sweden'. Name is identical. GÖTEBORG vs Goteborg is minor accent/capitalization difference which is allowed normalization. Country Sweden is explicit in both. Rule 4.1.3.1 gives direct MATCH. Rule 4.1.4 land check passes.

consignee.certificate_value: PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, UKRAINE
consignee.invoice_value: PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, Ukraine

comparison_steps.description: Check Bill to / Sold to fields first
comparison_steps.result: Bill to: PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, Ukraine. This is the primary factoring field.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee name vs invoice Bill to name

comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Certificate: UKRAINE, Invoice Bill to: Ukraine. Same country after normalization.

rules_applied.description: Bill to field identified as primary factoring field

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'PC Prompodshipnik' at '7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, UKRAINE' exactly matches invoice Bill to field 'PC Prompodshipnik' at '7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, Ukraine'. Name identical. Address identical. Country UKRAINE/Ukraine matches after case normalization. Also confirmed in Sold to and Ship to fields.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate box 2: 'PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, UKRAINE'. Invoice Bill to: 'PC Prompodshipnik, 7, Tereshkina Str., 51400 Pavlohrad, Ukraine'. Perfect match on name, address, and country. Rule 4.2.0.2 identifies Bill to as primary field. Rule 4.2.2 confirms name. Rule 4.2.3 confirms country.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Bearings,seals,lubricants
For detailed description refer to the invoice
8500030660 Dated 24.02.2026
goods_description.invoice_value: LUBRICANTS, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG (Invoice 8500030660, dated 24.02.2026)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate uses general description with explicit invoice reference
comparison_steps.result: Certificate states 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' and 'For detailed description refer to the invoice 8500030660 Dated 24.02.2026'. This is a general description with explicit invoice reference and date.

comparison_steps.description: Verify invoice number and date match
comparison_steps.result: Certificate reference: 8500030660, dated 24.02.2026. Invoice: number 8500030660, date 24.02.2026. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that invoice content is consistent with certificate description
comparison_steps.result: Certificate describes 'Bearings, seals, lubricants'. Invoice contains: LUBRICANTS (AT, JP), DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG (FR) = bearings, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS (MX) = seals, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG (PL, SE) = bearings. Invoice content is fully consistent with certificate's general description.

Certificate contains general description with reference to invoice. Invoice provides country of manufacturing per article line. Certificate's reference to invoice satisfies the vara–ursprungsland coupling requirement per 4.3.7.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certificate uses general description 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' with explicit reference to invoice 8500030660 dated 24.02.2026. Invoice reference and date match exactly. Invoice content (lubricants, bearings, seals) is fully consistent.
Koppling vara–ursprungsland – certificate references invoice for detailed description; invoice provides per-article country of manufacturing

goods_description.motivation: Certificate uses a general goods description 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' with explicit reference 'For detailed description refer to the invoice 8500030660 Dated 24.02.2026'. Invoice number 8500030660 and date 24.02.2026 match exactly. The invoice contains lubricants, bearings (deep groove ball bearings, spherical roller bearings), and seals (radial shaft seals), which is fully consistent with the certificate's general description. Per rule 4.3.5, this constitutes a verified goods description.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate box 6 states 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' and 'For detailed description refer to the invoice 8500030660 Dated 24.02.2026'. This triggers rule 4.3.5 (generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens). The certificate contains: (1) a general description, (2) an invoice number 8500030660, (3) an invoice date 24.02.2026, and (4) an explicit reference phrase 'For detailed description refer to the invoice'. Invoice confirms number 8500030660 and date 24.02.2026. Invoice goods (LUBRICANTS, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG) are fully consistent with 'Bearings,seals,lubricants'. No article numbers are explicitly listed in the certificate as part of the goods description requiring individual verification – the numbers 298621735 etc. are package/transport numbers, not article numbers. MATCH via 4.3.5.

quantity.certificate_value: GW in KGs 598,102 / NW in KGs 493,829
quantity.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG / Total Net Weight 493,829 KG

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains GW in KGs 598,102 and NW in KGs 493,829. Both are verifieringsgrundande.
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 values identified: GW 598,102 KGs and NW 493,829 KGs

comparison_steps.description: Check if 598,102 KG GW can be identified in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice page 5: 'Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG'. The comma in 598,102 is a decimal separator (European notation). Certificate value 598,102 KGs = 598.102 kg. Invoice value 598,102 KG = 598.102 kg. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 493,829 KG NW can be identified in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice page 5: 'Total Net Weight 493,829 KG'. Certificate: NW in KGs 493,829. Same decimal notation. Exact match.
Certificate explicitly states GW and NW. Invoice explicitly states Total Gross Weight and Total Net Weight. Both categories verified.
GW: 598.102 KG (cert) = 598.102 KG (inv). NW: 493.829 KG (cert) = 493.829 KG (inv). Both match exactly.

rules_applied.description: Förekomstkontroll – both GW and NW values found in invoice
Box 7 values used as verification basis
Viktkategori – GW and NW explicitly stated in both documents
Total vikt – exact match for both GW and NW

quantity.motivation: Certificate box 7 states GW in KGs 598,102 and NW in KGs 493,829. Invoice page 5 transport details state Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG and Total Net Weight 493,829 KG. Both GW and NW values match exactly between certificate and invoice. Weight categories (GW/NW) are explicitly identified in both documents. Units (KG/KGs) match.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'GW in KGs 598,102' and 'NW in KGs 493,829'. Invoice page 5: 'Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG' and 'Total Net Weight 493,829 KG'. The comma notation (598,102) is European decimal notation representing 598.102 kg. Both documents use the same notation. GW cert=598.102 vs inv=598.102 → exact match. NW cert=493.829 vs inv=493.829 → exact match. Both weight categories explicitly stated. Both verified per 4.4.1 förekomstkontroll. No calculation or summering needed. MATCH.

country_of_origin.certificate_value: AT FR JP MX PL SE
country_of_origin.invoice_value: Austria (AT), France (FR), Japan (JP), Mexico (MX), Poland (PL), Sweden (SE)

comparison_steps.result: Invoice page 1 has a column 'Country of manufacturing' listing: Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden. Invoice pages 3-4 detail view shows country codes per line: JP, AT, MX, FR, PL, SE.

comparison_steps.description: Normalize certificate ISO codes to full country names
comparison_steps.result: AT=Austria ✓, FR=France ✓, JP=Japan ✓, MX=Mexico ✓, PL=Poland ✓, SE=Sweden ✓. All six countries in certificate found in invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Check for non-EU origins in invoice vs certificate
comparison_steps.result: Certificate lists JP (Japan) and MX (Mexico) as non-EU origins. Invoice confirms Japan and Mexico as countries of manufacturing. Both non-EU countries are explicitly listed in certificate's origin field. No icke-EU country in invoice is missing from certificate.

Invoice's 'Country of manufacturing' column provides per-article origin assignment. Certificate references invoice for detailed description (4.3.5). Per 4.3.7, the reference to invoice satisfies coupling requirement.

rules_applied.description: Country of manufacturing column identified as origin field in invoice
ISO code normalization: AT→Austria, FR→France, JP→Japan, MX→Mexico, PL→Poland, SE→Sweden
Non-EU origin check – JP and MX are in both certificate and invoice
Mixed origins with per-article coupling via invoice reference

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate box 3 lists origins as 'AT FR JP MX PL SE'. Invoice 'Country of manufacturing' column lists Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden. After ISO code normalization: AT=Austria, FR=France, JP=Japan, MX=Mexico, PL=Poland, SE=Sweden. All six certificate origin countries are explicitly identified in the invoice's dedicated origin field. The invoice contains no additional origin countries beyond these six. Non-EU countries Japan and Mexico are both explicitly listed in the certificate.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'AT FR JP MX PL SE' (6 ISO alpha-2 country codes). Invoice page 1 'Country of manufacturing' column lists: Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden. Mapping: AT→Austria ✓, FR→France ✓, JP→Japan ✓, MX→Mexico ✓, PL→Poland ✓, SE→Sweden ✓. All 6 origins from certificate found in invoice. Invoice has no additional origins beyond these 6. Non-EU origins (JP=Japan, MX=Mexico) are in certificate's box 3 → no contradiction per 4.5.4.1. EU members in the list: AT, FR, PL, SE are all EU-27 member states. No EU normalization issue. MATCH per 4.5.5.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE – No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-26D-465612 is not an LC reference.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Document pairing – certificate file page 1 is the certificate; pages 2-6 of certificate file are embedded invoice copies (same invoice 8500030660). Invoice file (Document B) contains the independent verification invoice.
rule_evaluation_log.result: Pairing established: Certificate from Document A page 1, Invoice from Document B pages 1-5.
VALID – All three criteria met: (1) Invoice reference 8500030660 matches, (2) Consignor SKF Eurotrade AB found in invoice, (3) Consignee PC Prompodshipnik found in invoice.
Direct match – SKF Eurotrade AB is the invoice issuer. No koncernstruktur analysis needed.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Juridisk part – exact name match for consignor
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH – SKF Eurotrade AB identical in both documents

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee prioritetsordning – Bill to field identified
rule_evaluation_log.result: Bill to field found with PC Prompodshipnik, Ukraine
MATCH – PC Prompodshipnik identical in both
MATCH – Certificate has general description 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' with explicit reference to invoice 8500030660 dated 24.02.2026. Invoice number and date match. Invoice content consistent.
MATCH – Certificate references invoice for detailed description; invoice provides per-article country of manufacturing.
MATCH – Both GW 598.102 KG and NW 493.829 KG found exactly in invoice page 5
Box 7 contains GW and NW values – used as primary verification values
MATCH – Both documents explicitly state GW and NW categories
'Country of manufacturing' column identified as origin field

rule_evaluation_log.description: ISO code normalization for origin countries
rule_evaluation_log.result: All 6 codes mapped: AT→Austria, FR→France, JP→Japan, MX→Mexico, PL→Poland, SE→Sweden
JP and MX (non-EU) both explicitly in certificate box 3 and invoice. No unmatched non-EU origins.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The numbers 298621735, 445787638, etc. in certificate box 6 are article numbers requiring individual verification per 4.3.2
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: These are transport package numbers, not article/product numbers. The invoice page 5 confirms these as 'Transport package number(s)'. The certificate lists them under '10 packages of:' indicating they are package identifiers. Article numbers in the invoice are HS codes (e.g., 8482300000) and SKF product codes (e.g., 22326 CCJA/W33VA405). The certificate does not list individual product article numbers.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate comma notation 598,102 could mean 598102 (no decimal) rather than 598.102
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The invoice page 5 explicitly states 'Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG' and the invoice page 1 summary shows net kg values with same comma notation (e.g., 32,000 for Austria, 90,483 for France). The comma is consistently used as decimal separator throughout the invoice. The total net kg of 493,829 as sum of per-country values (32.000 + 90.483 + 65.000 + 1.260 + 11.762 + 293.324 = 493.829) confirms this interpretation.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH on origin because certificate uses ISO codes while invoice uses full country names
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.5.4 explicitly allows normalization between ISO country codes and full country names. AT=Austria, FR=France, etc. are standard ISO alpha-2 codes.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren SKF Eurotrade AB i Sverige är identisk i certifikatet och fakturan. Mottagaren PC Prompodshipnik i Ukraina är identisk. Varubeskrivningen 'Bearings, seals, lubricants' bekräftas av fakturans innehåll (lager, tätningar, smörjmedel) med korrekt fakturareferens. Vikt (brutto 598,102 kg och netto 493,829 kg) matchar exakt. Alla sex ursprungsländer (Österrike, Frankrike, Japan, Mexiko, Polen, Sverige) återfinns i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
summary_of_matches: Consignor: SKF Eurotrade AB, Sweden – exact match
Consignee: PC Prompodshipnik, Ukraine – exact match
Goods description: General description 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' verified via invoice reference 8500030660 dated 24.02.2026
Quantity: GW 598,102 KG and NW 493,829 KG – exact match
Country of origin: AT, FR, JP, MX, PL, SE – all six countries verified in invoice

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.rule_applied: Exakt namnmatchning av juridisk part med landverifiering
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'SKF Eurotrade AB' är identiskt i certifikatet och fakturan. Landet Sverige anges i båda dokumenten. Adressnormalisering: GÖTEBORG/Goteborg är tillåten variation.

sections.rule_applied: Exakt namnmatchning mot primärt faktureringsfält (Bill to) med landverifiering
sections.motivation: Mottagaren 'PC Prompodshipnik' är identisk i certifikatets box 2 och fakturans Bill to-fält. Adress och postnummer överensstämmer. Landet Ukraina anges i båda dokumenten.

sections.certificate_value: Bearings,seals,lubricants – For detailed description refer to the invoice 8500030660 Dated 24.02.2026

sections.rule_applied: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certifikatet hänvisar till fakturan med korrekt nummer och datum
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger en generell varubeskrivning 'Bearings,seals,lubricants' med uttrycklig hänvisning till faktura 8500030660 daterad 24.02.2026. Fakturanummer och datum överensstämmer exakt. Fakturans varuinnehåll (smörjmedel, kullager, tätningar, rullager) är fullt förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning.

sections.certificate_value: GW in KGs 598,102 / NW in KGs 493,829
sections.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG / Total Net Weight 493,829 KG
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll – exakt matchning av brutto- och nettovikt
sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt (GW) 598,102 KG matchar exakt fakturans Total Gross Weight 598,102 KG. Certifikatets nettovikt (NW) 493,829 KG matchar exakt fakturans Total Net Weight 493,829 KG. Viktkategorier (GW/NW) är uttryckligen angivna i båda dokumenten.

sections.certificate_value: AT FR JP MX PL SE
sections.invoice_value: Austria, France, Japan, Mexico, Poland, Sweden (Country of manufacturing)
sections.rule_applied: ISO-kodnormalisering – samtliga sex ursprungsländer i certifikatet identifierade i fakturans 'Country of manufacturing'-kolumn
sections.motivation: Certifikatet listar sex ursprungsländer med ISO-koder: AT (Österrike), FR (Frankrike), JP (Japan), MX (Mexiko), PL (Polen), SE (Sverige). Fakturans 'Country of manufacturing'-kolumn anger exakt dessa sex länder. Icke-EU-länder Japan och Mexiko anges i båda dokumenten. Inga ytterligare ursprungsländer förekommer i fakturan.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints evaluated as MATCH. All confidence values above 0.85. Comparison result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH. No blocking issues identified.
